title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Speed as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The impact of the strike is?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Master Kaddou is falling this way!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What Happened!? What the hell is that!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He laid a hand on master Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Please tell me they avoided it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys, head back to the mountain first!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I've got a bad feeling about this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Please hang in there!! What happened!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: didn't master speed leave this town earlier....!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She just came from the direction kaidou flew in from, and collapsed!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey!! Why are you here!!? Where's Tama!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You got her home safely, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I tried to fight him off, but...

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Big bro, I will never forget....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: of the Red Bean Portige and Apple I ate today!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 41 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
